body: Carlos, it was a pleasure seeing Verdant Hollow. The combat clarity stood out to our whole team. We would love to be considered as a publishing partner as you head toward Early Access. This is a non-binding note, no terms implied.
snippet: Carlos, it was a pleasure seeing Verdant Hollow. The combat clarity stood out to our whole
subject: Verdant Hollow, great to connect at the showcase

body: Thanks Sam, that means a lot coming from Ember Gate. I am heads down on the Act 3 work right now but I will get you a build key once the current pass is stable. No rush on my end to talk terms.
snippet: Thanks Sam, that means a lot coming from Ember Gate. I am heads down on the Act 3 work rig
subject: Re: Verdant Hollow, great to connect at the showcase

body: Perfect, whenever you are ready. Play first, talk later is exactly how we like to work.
snippet: Perfect, whenever you are ready. Play first, talk later is exactly how we like to work.
subject: Re: Verdant Hollow, great to connect at the showcase

body: Hi Carlos, we caught the demo and the wishlist momentum. Pixel North would like to see the Early Access build when it is ready before we discuss anything concrete. No pressure and no terms at this stage.
snippet: Hi Carlos, we caught the demo and the wishlist momentum. Pixel North would like to see the
subject: Verdant Hollow, Pixel North interest

body: Appreciated. I will keep you posted as we get closer to the Early Access build. Right now I am focused on locking the launch scope.
snippet: Appreciated. I will keep you posted as we get closer to the Early Access build. Right now
subject: Re: Verdant Hollow, Pixel North interest

body: Carlos, tracks 15 to 18 for the Act 3 Ascent set are on track for delivery on the tenth of October. Fourteen are already in the build and paid. I will send stems as each lands.
snippet: Carlos, tracks 15 to 18 for the Act 3 Ascent set are on track for delivery on the tenth of
subject: Soundtrack, Act 3 set timing

body: That works with the November launch. The Ascent set is the last big block before the finale and title themes. Thanks Alex.
snippet: That works with the November launch. The Ascent set is the last big block before the final
subject: Re: Soundtrack, Act 3 set timing

body: Also sending the invoice for track 14 through the usual platform. Five hundred as agreed.
snippet: Also sending the invoice for track 14 through the usual platform. Five hundred as agreed.
subject: Re: Soundtrack, Act 3 set timing

body: Hi, attaching invoice INV-2026-014 for the six-pose character sprite set, eighteen hundred, net fourteen days. Thanks for the continued work.
snippet: Hi, attaching invoice INV-2026-014 for the six-pose character sprite set, eighteen hundred
subject: Invoice, character sprite set

body: Received, paid it today. The set looks great, the walk cycle especially.
snippet: Received, paid it today. The set looks great, the walk cycle especially.
subject: Re: Invoice, character sprite set

body: Attaching INV-2026-016 for the thirty-icon UI pack, seven hundred, net fourteen.
snippet: Attaching INV-2026-016 for the thirty-icon UI pack, seven hundred, net fourteen.
subject: Invoice, UI icon pack

body: Paid. We will have another tileset request next month if you have room.
snippet: Paid. We will have another tileset request next month if you have room.
subject: Re: Invoice, UI icon pack

body: Moonstone Games is confirmed for Indie Horizons Expo, booth D14, event date the seventeenth of October. Exhibitor fee of ninety five paid. Bring a backup build on a separate drive.
snippet: Moonstone Games is confirmed for Indie Horizons Expo, booth D14, event date the seventeent
subject: Indie Horizons Expo, exhibitor confirmation

body: Your current lease ends at the end of December. We are offering a twelve or twenty four month renewal beginning in January. Please respond by the eighteenth of December.
snippet: Your current lease ends at the end of December. We are offering a twelve or twenty four mo
subject: Lease renewal

body: Hey, showing you the 0.8.3 build Sunday if you are around. The level select flow got the rework you flagged.
snippet: Hey, showing you the 0.8.3 build Sunday if you are around. The level select flow got the r
subject: Playtest this week

body: Yes. The navigation on the third screen was my main note, glad that is in. I will bring fresh eyes.
snippet: Yes. The navigation on the third screen was my main note, glad that is in. I will bring fr
subject: Re: Playtest this week

body: Second Sunday dinner is on, I am making chile verde. Bring Mia. Your father wants to hear about the game.
snippet: Second Sunday dinner is on, I am making chile verde. Bring Mia. Your father wants to hear
subject: Family dinner Sunday

body: We will be there. Tyler might swing by after. Save me the crispy bits.
snippet: We will be there. Tyler might swing by after. Save me the crispy bits.
subject: Re: Family dinner Sunday

body: Surviving clinic rotations, barely. How is the game.
snippet: Surviving clinic rotations, barely. How is the game.
subject: Checking in

body: Getting close. You are getting a copy whether you play games or not. Come by for arroz con pollo soon.
snippet: Getting close. You are getting a copy whether you play games or not. Come by for arroz con
subject: Re: Checking in

body: How is the runway looking. You know I worry. Do not sign anything without reading it twice.
snippet: How is the runway looking. You know I worry. Do not sign anything without reading it twice
subject: Dad checking in on the studio

body: Runway is fine, about eight months. I am truing up the numbers before I make any publisher call. Nothing gets signed without a proper look.
snippet: Runway is fine, about eight months. I am truing up the numbers before I make any publisher
subject: Re: Dad checking in on the studio

body: Your Evergreen Silver plan summary for the year is attached. Monthly premium three hundred twenty. Keep your member ID handy.
snippet: Your Evergreen Silver plan summary for the year is attached. Monthly premium three hundred
subject: Health plan summary
